mapper.select: SELECT s.id AS orderId,s.book_id AS bookId,b.title AS title,s.quantity AS quantity,s.status AS status,s.created_at AS createdAt FROM sales s JOIN books b ON s.book_id = b.id ORDER BY s.created_at DESC

SELECT s.id AS orderId,s.book_id AS bookId,b.title AS title, s.quantity AS quantity,s.status AS status,s.created_at AS createdAt, b.title AS title FROM sales s JOIN books b ON s.book_id = b.id WHERE s.user_id = #{id} ORDER BY s.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sales (user_id, book_id, quantity,status, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{bookId}, #{quantity}, '未発送',CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE sales SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, book_id AS bookId, quantity, created_at as createdAt FROM sales WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE sales SET status = '発送済' WHERE id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT b.title AS title, SUM(s.quantity) AS salesAmount, SUM(s.quantity * CAST(b.price AS INTEGER)) AS totalSales FROM sales s JOIN books b ON s.book_id = b.id /* ここを ::DATE に変更 */ WHERE s.created_at::DATE BETWEEN #{startDate}::DATE AND #{endDate}::DATE GROUP BY b.title
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, book_id AS bookId, quantity, stock, created_at as createdAt
